description: From the manufacturer Gently Cleanse and Exfoliate CeraVe SA Smoothing Cleanser Developed with Dermatologists, CeraVe SA Smoothing Cleanser gently exfoliates the face and body. Suitable for Dry, Rough & Bumpy Skin. The formula is enriched with 3 Essential Ceramides, Salicylic Acid and Hyaluronic Acid, to gently exfoliate and deliver smoother, softer skin while helping protect the skin's natural barrier. CeraVe's patented MVE Technology locks in moisture to provide continuous hydration for 24 hours. Also suitable for Keratosis Pilaris and Psoriasis-Prone Skin. Previous page For Rough and Bumpy Skin CeraVe SA Smoothing Cleanser Gently exfoliates to deliver smoother, softer skin while helping protect the skin's natural barrier. For Rough and Bumpy Skin CeraVe SA Smoothing Cream CeraVe SA Smoothing Cream is a rich, fragrance-free moisturiser for gentle body exfoliation. For Dry and Rough Hands CeraVe Reparative Hand Cream A deeply moisturising, reparative hand cream for dry, rough hands. With 3 essential ceramides. For Normal to Dry Skin CeraVe Am Facial Moisturising Lotion with SPF 50 Daily lightweight facial moisturiser with SPF 50 for UVB/UVA protection & 3 essential ceramides. Which Cleanser is best for dry skin and which cleanser is best for oily skin? We recommend our Hydrating Cleanser for normal to dry skin and the Foaming Cleanser for normal to oily skin

product_details_tab_data.Title: CeraVe SA Smoothing Cleanser with Salicylic Acid for Dry, Rough & Bumpy Skin 236ml
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Beauty › Skin Care › Face › Exfoliators › Scrubs
product_details_tab_data.Specific Uses: Suitable for use morning and evening. Apply to wet hands and massage into the skin, then rinse thoroughly.
product_details_tab_data.Product Benefit: Enriched with 3 Essential Ceramides, Salicylic Acid and Hyaluronic Acid.
product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: AQUA/WATER, SODIUM LAUROYL SARCOSINATE, COCAMIDOPROPYL HYDROXYSULTAINE, GLYCERIN, NIACINAMIDE, GLUCONOLACTONE, SODIUM METHYL COCOYL TAURATE, PEG-150 PENTAERYTHRITYL TETRASTEARATE, CERAMIDE NP, CERAMIDE AP, CERAMIDE EOP, CARBOMER, CALCIUM GLUCONATE, SALICYLIC ACID, SODIUM BENZOATE, SODIUM LAUROYL LACTYLATE, CHOLESTEROL, PHENOXYETHANOL, DISODIUM EDTA, TETRASODIUM EDTA, HYDROLYZED HYALURONIC ACID, PHYTOSPHINGOSINE, XANTHAN GUM, ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN
